Package com.linecorp.centraldogma.server.plugin

Interface Plugin

public interface Plugin
An interface which defines callbacks for a plug-in.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    default boolean isEnabled​(CentralDogmaConfig config)
    Returns true if this Plugin is enabled.
    CompletionStage<Void> start​(PluginContext context)
    Invoked when this Plugin is supposed to be started.
    CompletionStage<Void> stop​(PluginContext context)
    Invoked when this Plugin is supposed to be stopped.
    PluginTarget target()
    Returns the PluginTarget which specifies the replicas that this Plugin is applied to.

  • Method Details

    • target

      PluginTarget target()
      Returns the PluginTarget which specifies the replicas that this Plugin is applied to.

    • start

      CompletionStage<Void> start​(PluginContext context)
      Invoked when this Plugin is supposed to be started.
      Parameters:
      context - the context which consists of the objects required to execute this Plugin

    • stop

      CompletionStage<Void> stop​(PluginContext context)
      Invoked when this Plugin is supposed to be stopped.
      Parameters:
      context - the context which consists of the objects required to execute this Plugin

    • isEnabled

      default boolean isEnabled​(CentralDogmaConfig config)
      Returns true if this Plugin is enabled.
